ab: cyu kya sali uya?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: cyu kya, cyu m’abi beh ’byan nya.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: cyu kya sali uya?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ungat, wayan tanux micu hani, gbyan mosa mwah sali la.
ch: B:沒有，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: cyu kya sali uba?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: cyu beh yatux bawi sali, karaw haliy hkani kya.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: kyan c’oli maki sali?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: isu Wilang ga, bsya ci ini misu texi la, lokah su?
ch: B:是Wilang你阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Wilang. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: lokah, nyu caku mwah cisan isu.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: cyu inu yaba su?
en: Where is your father?

ab: cyu beh puyan kya phapuy rami, halan mu smuy.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: wayan inu Cmyax?
en: Where did Cmyax go?

ab: wayan kmiyak welung beh libu walung kya.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: uba , nyan cami la.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: ini aki sali uba mamu, cyu maki beh cla’an, naga beh sali mamu.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: ’nyan mama su la.
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: bsya ci ini misu texi la, wa su bawi la.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: m’es caku ci texan misu mwah.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: bne mu cimu kaway hani, hali posa tl’tu pskuw kya.
ch: B:這是給你們的李子，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: ca bsya ci ini su uwah la, mosa cu tmapeh kwara naha ms’un ta mani myux.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: ana la, nbu cu ocya lga myasa la, hata mtisan beh wahan tama c’oli kya.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: mhway ci spkani su kinang, mosa caku la.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: knut mu micu welung hani, rasi thwayi mani.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
